data.text: Hi, I’m Mariusz, and this is my new blog.

I created this space to share what I learn while building software, solving problems, and improving as a developer. Most of my posts will be about JavaScript, React, TypeScript, code quality, and the small details that make code easier to understand and maintain.
I also want this blog to be practical. That means I’ll try to write about real problems, useful patterns, and lessons from building things that actually run in production.
If you enjoy thoughtful programming posts, debugging stories, or clear explanations of tricky frontend topics, you’re in the right place.
